_comment: OpenRouter configuration — free model list and API key rotation. Keys are read from OPENROUTER_API_KEY_1..N env vars (or OPENROUTER_API_KEY for single key). Models are tried in order; on 401/429/busy errors the next key+model is tried.
_researcher_model_comment: Primary model for dual researcher pass. Falls back to free_models chain if unavailable.
_api_keys_comment: Env vars checked in order. All non-empty values are collected into a rotation pool. Set at least OPENROUTER_API_KEY for single-key use.
_retry_comment: HTTP status codes that trigger key rotation + model fallback.
